title: Scale standardization to all verified-open datasets
context: Backlog (after pilot proven). Apply the proven standardization pipeline to all verified-open datasets. Binding cancer guardrails apply: ONLY open-access / aggregate / de-identified public data; controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks) and any identifiable patient data are out of scope; not medical advice; when in doubt, stop and surface. No partner/beneficiary is secured yet, so verifiedNeed is false.
objective: Scale the validated standardization pipeline to standardize all verified-open datasets into CELLxGENE-schema outputs with provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Every verified-open dataset standardized to a cellxgene-schema-valid output with QC + provenance.
Only verified-open sources processed; no controlled/identifiable data present.
Each output reproducible by an independent runner.
